capabilities.name: Manager approval workflow
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Skill: manage_timesheet_approval(approve, 2026-07-02..02) live via MCP gateway → entries_updated:1, approval_status stamped with approved_by/approved_at. Backend: time_entries.approval_status draft|submitted|approved|rejected + approval_notes (migration 20260707211000). UI: TimesheetsPage approval bar + status badges (Lovable build 2026-07-07).
capabilities.notes: submit is owner-scoped; approve/reject require admin/approver. split/edit of approved entries rejected until re-rejected.

capabilities.name: Multi-project day split
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Skill: split_time_entry live via MCP gateway (2h entry → 1h+1h, ids returned; earlier SQL test split 10h → 6h+4h across two projects with sum validation). UI: TimesheetsPage row action Split dialog (Lovable build 2026-07-07).
capabilities.notes: Allocations must sum to the original hours unless allow_total_change; project_name resolved case-insensitively; invoiced/approved entries rejected.

capabilities.name: Indirect time (PTO/training)
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Skill: log_indirect_time(category=sick/training/overhead) live via MCP gateway → categorized entries on auto-created 'Internal (non-billable)' project; time_entries.category work|pto|sick|training|overhead. UI: category select in new-entry form (Lovable build 2026-07-07).
capabilities.notes: Sick days flow into payroll_timesheet_basis.sick_days → apply_sick_pay.

capabilities.name: Overtime/shift rules
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Skill: apply_overtime_rules(2026-07-01..07, threshold 8h) live via MCP gateway → 10h day flagged 2h overtime on entries (time_entries.overtime_hours, idempotent recompute). UI: overtime indicator + Apply-overtime button in Reports tab (Lovable build 2026-07-07).
capabilities.notes: Daily-threshold rule (default 8h/day, work category only). Shift calendars/multipliers per shift not modeled — threshold+multiplier covers the Odoo base case.

capabilities.name: Feed payroll
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-07 (agent surface). Skills live via MCP gateway: payroll_timesheet_basis(2026-07) → per-employee work/overtime/pto hours + sick_days (verified sick day logged via log_indirect_time appeared as sick_days:1); apply_timesheet_overtime(draft run edfe5125) → 2 OT hours × salary/168 × 1.5 = 75000 öre added to gross, tax/social/net recomputed, run totals refreshed (apply_sick_pay adjustment pattern, idempotent).

capabilities.name: Utilization analytics
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Skill: timesheet_utilization_report(2026-07-01..07) live via MCP gateway → per-person work/billable/pto/sick/training/overtime hours, capacity (workdays×8), utilization 25%, billable 100%, cost/revenue cents. UI: Reports tab on TimesheetsPage (Lovable build 2026-07-07).

capabilities.name: Employee labor cost
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-07. time_entries.cost_rate_cents (per-entry override) + fallback employees.monthly_salary_cents/168h; live gateway report showed cost_cents 450000 for 18h logged (QA Hire, 42000 kr salary → 250 kr/h). Margin = revenue (project rate × billable h) − cost in the same report.
capabilities.notes: Cost surfaces through timesheet_utilization_report; per-entry cost_rate_cents column ready for role-based rates.
